notes: class_weight=balanced, no undersampling, negations preserved in stopword removal; C and max_features from 3-fold grid search. WARNING: shared_test_* metrics are inflated — the TF-IDF trains on ~80% of the full 284k corpus, so ~80% of the 10k shared rows were already in its training set. The primary accuracy/f1_weighted from the TF-IDF's own 57k held-out set are the honest numbers.
